description.LOCATION_EN: Airport Express Line and Tung Chung Line Service Disruption
description.LOCATION_CN: 機場快綫及東涌綫服務延誤

2024-03-09T06:14:00.CONTENT_EN: Train service on Airport Express and between Sunny Bay Station and Tung Chung Station on the Tung Chung Line have been suspended. Please consider using other transport.
2024-03-09T06:14:00.CONTENT_CN: 機場快綫全綫列車服務及東涌綫來往欣澳站至東涌站的列車服務暫停，請考慮使用其他交通工具。

2024-03-09T06:40:00.CONTENT_EN: Train service on Airport Express and between Sunny Bay Station and Tung Chung Station on the Tung Chung Line have been suspended. Please consider using other transport.
2024-03-09T06:40:00.CONTENT_CN: 機場快綫全綫列車服務及東涌綫來往欣澳站至東涌站的列車服務暫停，請考慮使用其他交通工具。

2024-03-09T06:42:00.CONTENT_EN:
Train Service Disruption on the Airport Express and Tung Chung Line due to fire occurred near Sunny Bay Station. 
For more details, please visit: https://www.td.gov.hk/en/special_news/spnews.htm

Please allow more time for travel.
2024-03-09T06:42:00.CONTENT_CN:
詳情請參看: https://www.td.gov.hk/tc/special_news/spnews.htm

詳情請參看: https://www.td.gov.hk/tc/special_news/spnews.htm


請為行程預留充裕時間。

2024-03-09T07:10:00.CONTENT_EN: The fire occurred near Sunny Bay Station on the Airport Express & Tung Chung Line has been handled. Normal train service is gradually resuming.
2024-03-09T07:10:00.CONTENT_CN: 在欣澳站附近火警已經妥善處理，機場快綫及東涌綫列車服務逐步回復正常。

2024-03-09T06:45:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to high wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) HKLR, with details as shown below: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR is lowered from 100 km/h to 50 km/h.
2024-03-09T06:45:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於強風，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下特別交通及運輸安排： 港珠澳大橋香港連接路的最高車速限制由每小時100 公里降低至每小時50 公里。

2024-03-09T08:50:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to improved weather condition, the following arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) HKLR: The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR resumes to 100 km/h.
2024-03-09T08:50:00.CONTENT_CN: 因天氣情況改善，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下安排： 港珠澳大橋香港連接路最高車速限制恢復為每小時100 公里。
